turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good morning. I just wanted to confirm — do you have a visiting consultant system or are all your doctors full time?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! We have a mix. Several specialists like our cardiologist, neurologist, and gynaecologist are visiting consultants with fixed clinic days. Our general physician and emergency team are full-time.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: So how do I know when a specific doctor is available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You can call us and we'll check the schedule for any specific doctor. We'll let you know their available days and times before you book.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay. And do doctors run on time or is there usually a long wait?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We do our best to keep appointments on time. Average wait is 10-15 minutes. For very popular specialists like cardiology, it can sometimes be 20-25 minutes, but our staff will keep you informed.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's acceptable. Good to know. Thank you.
